name: Vietnam Business Email List

decision_maker_profile.buying_authority: High — direct purchase authority typical at SME level

compliance.notes: Standard opt-out and sender identification required.

market_summary: Vietnam is one of the world's fastest-growing economies, averaging 6-7% GDP growth over the past decade, driven by export-oriented manufacturing (electronics, textiles, footwear) and a rapidly expanding services sector. Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon) is the commercial capital — Vietnam's largest city and the centre of its financial, trade, and startup activity. Hanoi is the political capital with significant government-sector activity. Da Nang is a growing technology and outsourcing hub. Vietnam has become a major electronics manufacturing alternative to China, with Samsung, Apple supplier Foxconn, LG, and Intel all operating significant facilities.
strategy_note: Vietnamese B2B cold email in English works for the international business and technology sectors. Vietnamese is preferred for domestically-oriented companies. The Vietnamese startup ecosystem (VC-backed companies in Ho Chi Minh City) is increasingly internationally connected and responds to professional direct outreach. Manufacturing sector relationships typically require trade missions or in-person engagement given the complexity of supply chain negotiations.
culture_note: Vietnamese business culture is relationship-oriented, hierarchical, and face-conscious. Trust is built slowly but reliably once established. Business cards are exchanged with both hands. Hierarchy is respected — always engage senior decision-makers first. The 'Tet' holiday (Lunar New Year) is Vietnam's most important business calendar event — plan around the two-week business slowdown.
hubs: Hanoi (Ba Dinh, Cau Giay tech district)
facts: Vietnam is the world's 2nd largest coffee exporter and largest robusta coffee producer
Samsung Vietnam operations account for 25% of all Vietnamese exports
Vietnam's tech sector grew 30% annually for 5 consecutive years through 2024
Vietnam has one of the world's highest smartphone adoption growth rates
Ho Chi Minh City produced its first unicorn startup (VNLife) in 2021
industry_note: Manufacturing & Electronics is the defining export sector — concentrated in Binh Duong, Dong Nai (industrial parks south of HCMC) and Bac Ninh/Bac Giang (north of Hanoi). Technology is growing rapidly in HCMC's District 1 and Hanoi's Cau Giay. Agriculture & Aquaculture (seafood, coffee, rice) are major export sectors.
